title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Bajaj Electricals

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Bajaj Electricals
jsonLd.description:
We at Bajaj Electricals are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Bajaj Electricals:
Bajaj Electricals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Electricals!
